name: klipy-gifs
title: Klipy GIFs
description: Search KLIPY's GIF library and copy, paste, download, or share GIFs.
author: yash

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search GIFs
commands.subtitle: Klipy
commands.description: Search KLIPY for GIFs and act on them.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Klipy App Key
preferences.description: Your KLIPY app key. Get one free at https://partner.klipy.com (Add Platform → generate key).

preferences.name: customerId
preferences.title: Customer ID
preferences.description: Optional stable per-user id KLIPY uses for personalization and de-duplication. Leave blank if unsure.

preferences.name: contentFilter
preferences.title: Content Filter
preferences.description: Safe-search level applied to all KLIPY requests.

preferences.name: limit
preferences.title: Results Per Search
preferences.description: How many GIFs to fetch per query (8-50).

preferences.name: gridColumns
preferences.title: Grid Columns
preferences.description: Number of columns in the GIF grid.

preferences.name: primaryAction
preferences.title: Primary Action
preferences.description: What Enter does on a selected GIF.
